block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: Solar stocks experienced a boost on Wednesday when it was announced that Korea-based Qcells would be investing $2.5 billion in expanding its solar power manufacturing facilities in the U.S. state of Georgia. Solar stocks reached a new 52-week high during the session, with an average increase of 5.8%. Some of the notable stocks that saw the boosts include First Solar.
block_07: Coinbase's stock prices have increased by more than 25% over the past five days. This week's news that the company would be laying off more than 20% of its staff has helped to reduce some fears about the company's future.
block_10: Shares of the drugmaker have lost 6% over the past week, which is more than the Medical sector's loss of 1.9%. AbbVie will be looking to display strength as it nears its next earnings release, which is expected to be February 9, 2023.
